creator: gwk@anaconda.dkrz.de
text:
cpio -O ignores the current umask when creating output files.
The output file is being created with mode 0666.

How-To-Repeat: 
anaconda[549]$ umask
027
anaconda[550]$ ls -l
anaconda[551]$ touch abc
anaconda[552]$ ls -l
total 0
-rw-r-----  1 gwk  cray  0 Jul 16 11:02 abc
anaconda[553]$ echo abc | cpio -o -O bad.cpo
1 block
anaconda[554]$ ls -l
total 4
-rw-r-----  1 gwk  cray    0 Jul 16 11:02 abc
-rw-rw-rw-  1 gwk  cray  512 Jul 16 11:02 bad.cpo
